# gravit-ai-toolkit — Codex skill bundle

This directory snapshots every marketplace skill hierarchy as plain files so
**Codex** (and any AGENTS.md-based tool) can use the skills without Claude Code's
plugin mechanism. Each source retains its `skills/` hierarchy under `sources/`;
only required shared assets and licenses are included alongside it.

**How to use in Codex:** read the matching `SKILL.md` linked below, then follow
its instructions. MCP-backed skills provide guidance text only unless the matching
MCP server is configured in the consuming environment.

| [`verification-before-completion`](sources/superpowers/skills/verification-before-completion/SKILL.md) | Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always | `obra/superpowers@d884ae04edebef577e82ff7c4e143debd0bbec99` |
| [`wayfinder`](sources/mattpocock-skills/skills/engineering/wayfinder/SKILL.md) | Plan a huge chunk of work — more than one agent session can hold — as a shared map of investigation tickets on your issue tracker, and resolve them one at a time until the way to the destination is clear. | `mattpocock/skills@d574778f94cf620fcc8ce741584093bc650a61d3` |
| [`wizard`](sources/mattpocock-skills/skills/in-progress/wizard/SKILL.md) | Generate an interactive bash wizard that walks a human through a manual procedure — third-party setup, a one-off migration, an A→B state transition — opening URLs, capturing values, confirming each step, and writing .env files and GitHub A… | `mattpocock/skills@d574778f94cf620fcc8ce741584093bc650a61d3` |
| [`writing-beats`](sources/mattpocock-skills/skills/in-progress/writing-beats/SKILL.md) | Writing, exploit — assemble raw material into a journey of beats, grounding each term before a beat leans on it. | `mattpocock/skills@d574778f94cf620fcc8ce741584093bc650a61d3` |
| [`writing-fragments`](sources/mattpocock-skills/skills/in-progress/writing-fragments/SKILL.md) | Writing, explore — mine raw fragments, no structure yet. | `mattpocock/skills@d574778f94cf620fcc8ce741584093bc650a61d3` |
| [`writing-great-skills`](sources/mattpocock-skills/skills/productivity/writing-great-skills/SKILL.md) | Reference for writing and editing skills well — the vocabulary and principles that make a skill predictable. | `mattpocock/skills@d574778f94cf620fcc8ce741584093bc650a61d3` |
| [`writing-plans`](sources/superpowers/skills/writing-plans/SKILL.md) | Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code | `obra/superpowers@d884ae04edebef577e82ff7c4e143debd0bbec99` |
| [`writing-shape`](sources/mattpocock-skills/skills/in-progress/writing-shape/SKILL.md) | Writing, exploit — shape raw material into an article, paragraph by paragraph. | `mattpocock/skills@d574778f94cf620fcc8ce741584093bc650a61d3` |
| [`writing-skills`](sources/superpowers/skills/writing-skills/SKILL.md) | Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment | `obra/superpowers@d884ae04edebef577e82ff7c4e143debd0bbec99` |
